headline: A New Era in Schizophrenia Care: National Council for Mental Wellbeing and Bristol Myers Squibb Collaborate to Advance Evidence-Based Care Models
summary: WASHINGTON, D.C. / ACCESS Newswire / March 27, 2026 /Originally published by the National Council for Mental Wellbeing The collaboration's first initiative is a white paper demonstrating the value of peer support programs to improve engagement, retention ...
